## Model links (for local users)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)


FLUX.2 Klein (9B and 4B) is designed for a
base resolution of 1024x1024, supporting up to 4MP (e.g., 2048x2048). For optimal results and efficiency, start at
and use multiples of 16 for any custom resolutions. 
Recommended Settings for Flux 2 Klein:

    Ideal Base Resolution:
    (square),
    (portrait), or
    (landscape).
    Optimal Performance Range: 1MP to 2MP ensures high-quality results without exceeding optimal VRAM usage.
    Maximum Quality: Up to 4MP (2048x2048 or equivalent pixels).
    Aspect Ratios: Supports various formats including 1:1, 16:9, 3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 9:16, 2:3, 3:4, and 4:5.
    Tips:
        Speed/Prototyping (4B): 512–768 px on the short edge.
        Quality/Final Rendering (9B): 1024–1536 px base, then upscale.
        Upscaling: Use SD Ultimate Upscaler to achieve 4048px or higher.
